ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: I am able to feel a wide range of emotions (e.g., happiness, sadness, anger, and fear).
Notes: 1 = Entirely typical of me; 2 = Very typical of me; 3 = Somewhat typical of me; 4 = A little typical of me; 5 = Not at all typical of me;

ElementDescription: I feel cut off from my emotions.
Notes: 1 = Not at all typical of me; 2 = A little typical of me; 3 = Somewhat typical of me; 4 = Very typical of me; 5 = Entirely typical of me

ElementDescription: In situations when other people have strong emotional responses, I don't feel anything at all.
Notes: 1 = Not at all typical of me; 2 = A little typical of me; 3 = Somewhat typical of me; 4 = Very typical of me; 5 = Entirely typical of me

ElementDescription: There are certain emotions that I cannot feel.
Notes: 1 = Not at all typical of me; 2 = A little typical of me; 3 = Somewhat typical of me; 4 = Very typical of me; 5 = Entirely typical of me

ElementDescription: I think of myself as a very emotional person.
Notes: 1 = Entirely typical of me; 2 = Very typical of me; 3 = Somewhat typical of me; 4 = A little typical of me; 5 = Not at all typical of me;

ElementDescription: I have a hard time feeling close to people, even my friends or family.
Notes: 1 = Not at all typical of me; 2 = A little typical of me; 3 = Somewhat typical of me; 4 = Very typical of me; 5 = Entirely typical of me

ElementDescription: I feel like I am emotionally numb.
Notes: 1 = Not at all typical of me; 2 = A little typical of me; 3 = Somewhat typical of me; 4 = Very typical of me; 5 = Entirely typical of me

ElementDescription: There are some negative emotions that I rarely feel even when there is reason to feel them.
Notes: 1 = Not at all typical of me; 2 = A little typical of me; 3 = Somewhat typical of me; 4 = Very typical of me; 5 = Entirely typical of me
